summary: Frontend-only testing of new trust UI (TrustBar, Security FAQ, VirusTotal links, changelog v0.4.5, lang toggle). 4/5 features PASS. Security page missing TrustBar render (imported but not used in JSX).

ui_bugs.issue: TrustBar is imported (line 5) but NEVER rendered in JSX. Requirement states 'TrustBar renders again below the hero' on /security. Currently only architecture, guarantees, security-faq and secure-installer are shown. `document.querySelectorAll('[data-testid=trust-bar]').length === 0` on /security.

verified_features.landing_trustbar: PASS - trust-bar renders with all 6 items (trust-virustotal, trust-sha256, trust-oss, trust-reversible, trust-noremote, trust-local). VirusTotal is <a> href=https://www.virustotal.com/gui/file/8460ed1d73dbaa6415e2ab9035293d411639fa8642e44d46147043dfc372130c. OSS is <a> href=https://github.com/WjRKO/ForgeFPS. No page errors.
verified_features.security_faq: PASS - security-faq renders with faq-item-0..5. Clicking faq-toggle-1 expands answer, clicking again collapses. Accordion behavior confirmed (opening faq-toggle-2 collapses faq-1). SecureInstaller appears below FAQ.
verified_features.security_trustbar: FAIL - trust-bar count is 0 on /security page (see ui_bugs).
verified_features.desktop_agent_vt: PASS - Route is /app/desktop (not /desktop-agent). After admin login, exe-sha256 and exe-virustotal both present. exe-virustotal is <a> with href=https://www.virustotal.com/gui/file/<sha256> matching AGENT_EXE_SHA256.
verified_features.changelog_045: PASS - release-0.4.5 is at TOP of timeline. Order: ['release-0.4.5','release-0.4.2','release-0.4.0','release-0.3.0']. Contains 'VirusTotal', 'FAQ', 'Consent', 'demo' text.
verified_features.lang_toggle: PASS - trust-bar remains visible after IT/EN toggle, labels change (EN len=89, IT len=103). No breakage.

action_items: Fix Security.jsx: add <TrustBar /> section below the hero (before or between the existing sections). It's imported at line 5 but never rendered in the JSX.
critical_code_review_comments: Security.jsx imports TrustBar and SecurityFaq but only renders SecurityFaq — dead import for TrustBar indicates incomplete implementation of the requirement.
Console shows 401 errors on public pages (Landing/Security/Changelog) — likely /api/auth/me probe when not logged in. Non-blocking but should be silenced or handled gracefully.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Only one fix needed: render <TrustBar /> inside Security.jsx JSX (below hero, above/below Architecture section). Everything else works. DesktopAgent route is /app/desktop (protected). Landing shows Italian by default; lang toggle button label reads 'IT'/'EN'.
rca of the issue: Security.jsx line 5 imports TrustBar component but the JSX (lines 60-112) only includes MarketingNav, hero, Architecture section, Guarantees section, SecurityFaq, SecureInstaller, MarketingFooter. Missing: <TrustBar /> render call. Fix: add <section className='mb-10'><TrustBar /></section> after the hero div (after line 67).
